backend.changelog: BOM tree tidy-up: the assembly-selection Clear button now sits in the checkbox column header, and Expand Items / Collapse Items also expand and collapse the documents (the separate Expand Docs / Collapse Docs buttons are gone). Updates: when the one-click helper is missing on a Windows host, Settings now shows the correct PowerShell command to enable it (instead of a Linux SSH line).

cadBridge.changelog: Supports selective generate runs from the gateway (1.1.42+): outputs are produced only for the assemblies ticked in the BOM tree, while the root assembly stays open without being exported.
